name: bindpos
description: Firedancer 'Bind Position': spokes of offset-bound bullets drift radially outward while rotating around the enemy and riding along with the enemy's own movement (fire().bind()). By default each bullet spirals individually (hurricane arms); bindRotation=1 also advances the volley spawn angle in lockstep with the bullets' rotation, so every spoke stays one straight radial line - set rotateSpeed to the enemy sprite's rotation speed (-40 / 60 degrees per frame) to bind the arms to the sprite's spin.

spokeCount.description: Bullets per volley, evenly spread around the circle

rotateSpeed.description: Bullet rotation around the enemy per frame (degrees); use -40 / 60 to match the enemy sprite

bindRotation.description: 1 = rotate the volley spawn angle at rotateSpeed too, keeping each spoke a straight radial line (bind to the enemy's rotation speed); 0 = spawn angles fixed, arms wind into spirals
